work_history.title: Staff Software Engineer
work_history.description: Lead architecture and delivery of the platform engineering roadmap for a team of 12 engineers. Designed a distributed event-driven microservices system handling 500M+ requests per day. Drove adoption of TypeScript, GraphQL, and infrastructure-as-code across the org.

work_history.title: Senior Software Engineer
work_history.description: Worked on the News Feed ranking infrastructure. Improved content delivery latency by 22% through service decomposition and caching strategies. Mentored 5 engineers and led the migration of 3 legacy services to Go.

work_history.title: Software Engineer
work_history.description: Built payment processing APIs and developer tooling. Contributed to the Ruby and Python SDKs. Improved API response time by 18% via async job queuing and connection pooling.
